data.body: Story 0 arawana: implemented tests/unit/test_llm_failure_matrix.py (31 green), committed a63ae39cc atop stack, hooks green. Mamba plan-review #1 = BLOCK (6 blocking, signed). Findings are GENUINE code-grounded (experiment log suppressed library-symbol FPs): (1) AC3 'behavior' undefined; (2-4) UsageLimitExceeded caught at runner.py:335 BEFORE the generic except-seam so 'classify at the single seam' is wrong; (5) wrapping 400 context-length in a typed LLMUnavailableError subclass breaks sizing.py is_context_limit_error ladder escalation; (6) content_filter finish_reason already raises UnretryableOutputError via check_stop_reason, not the except seam. Core correction: classifier is a PURE mapping utility invoked at EACH seam (the :335 UsageLimitExceeded arm, the structured finish_reason path, the generic except), preserving existing behaviors (UnretryableOutputError fast-fail + is_context_limit_error) — resolution_class is added metadata, not a swap of the raised type where predicates depend on it. Remediating mamba description + re-review.
